channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (All-time)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo all-time.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (194353 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.

⭐ Stelle: 194353

🍴 Forks: 109892

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: MIT License

]]>
